response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial automation, real-time systems, or IEC 62443 security standards — core requirements for this role. Their career is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web stacks, with only a brief early-career C++ stint at National Instruments, insufficient to meet senior C++ architecture demands.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse domains and languages
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead and mentor through workshops and community projects
concerns: Minimal recent or relevant C++ experience for high-performance industrial systems
No evidence of message brokers, MQTT, or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
Lacks exposure to Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards
